#  | archive.imgui.cc

> archive.imgui.cc was a community-driven resource dedicated to cataloging and sharing information about FastFlags configuration.

- [Information](https://archive.imgui.cc/index.md): Information
- [Contact](https://archive.imgui.cc/contact.md): Thanks a lot for spending your time helping.

## Help

- [How To Use](https://archive.imgui.cc/help/how.md): Open the Bloxstrap Menu.
- [Variables & Prefix](https://archive.imgui.cc/help/prefix.md): Label

## Fast Flags

- [Rendering API](https://archive.imgui.cc/fastflags/render.md): What Render API Roblox will use
- [Lightning Technologies](https://archive.imgui.cc/fastflags/lighting.md): Force lighting technologies on any game
- [Graphical Settings](https://archive.imgui.cc/fastflags/graphics.md): This does not affect performance
- [Quality of Life](https://archive.imgui.cc/fastflags/qol.md): Setting this to True will not do change anything
- [User Interface/Visuals](https://archive.imgui.cc/fastflags/ui.md): example
- [Experimental/Testing](https://archive.imgui.cc/fastflags/experimental.md): Person(s) you want to party with must have both of these to be disabled otherwise they won't be able to hear you/speak
- [Abusive](https://archive.imgui.cc/fastflags/abusive.md): FastFlags are not bannable by Roblox, but abusing them can get you banned from certain games.
- [Misc](https://archive.imgui.cc/fastflags/misc.md): @.rbx.bloxy
- [Audio Related](https://archive.imgui.cc/fastflags/audio.md): Default: [Min 7 Max 80]
- [Trash](https://archive.imgui.cc/fastflags/trash.md)
- [Presets](https://archive.imgui.cc/fastflags/presets.md): Please read each line before importing
